THE_ARCHITECT.talk.OKITASABER-OKITA.0-0r: The swiftest blade of a doomed age, coughing petals as she climbs. The Spire does not pity the dying, captain - but it respects a sword that never sheathes.
Ascend, then. My floors will not wait for your breath to catch - so do not let it slip.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.OKITASABER-OKITA.0-1r: Still seeking one last, perfect duel? Good. The Spire is nothing but the next opponent, forever.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.OKITASABER-OKITA.0-at: Unsheathe, captain. I have clocked faster steel - let us learn whether yours outruns the lungs that wield it.
